title: acronia alopex
side_effects: Acronia alopex can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing dizziness and nausea due to its high concentration of alkaloids. Prolonged consumption can also lead to stomach ulcers, diarrhea, and vomiting. In some cases, excessive use may cause respiratory problems, such as shortness of breath and wheezing, due to the plant's irritant properties. Furthermore, Acronia alopex can interact with certain medications, potentially exacerbating conditions like high blood pressure and heart disease.
